note: Curated torrent-source candidates for Opal, NOT yet in the live manifest. A live manifest entry only works if the app ships a matching nova2-style engine; these need an engine written first (see `engine`). This file is the source-of-truth so that work can proceed. Reachability was probed from a datacenter IP — `blocked-from-ci` means the probe was refused (geo/UA/Cloudflare), NOT that the site is dead; verify from a normal client. Deduped against the live manifest's existing torrent plugins.

sources.name: ExT
sources.notes: General indexer, HTML results. From FMHY + user list.

sources.name: Filemood
sources.notes: DHT/torrent meta-search. Confirmed live; result page title reflects the query. User-provided.

sources.name: NNM-Club
sources.notes: Russian tracker (forum-based). Confirmed 200. Downloads may require a free account. User-provided.

sources.name: Kinozal
sources.notes: Russian movie/TV tracker. From FMHY. Account likely needed for .torrent download.

sources.name: RuTracker
sources.notes: Large Russian tracker. Confirmed 200. Login required for magnet/.torrent — treat as authenticated (like jackett/torznab), not anonymous. From FMHY.

sources.name: TorrentSurf
sources.notes: General indexer (403 from CI — Cloudflare). From FMHY.

sources.name: Public Domain Torrents
sources.notes: Legal public-domain films only — safest of the set, good candidate to prioritize. From FMHY.

sources.name: nekoBT
sources.notes: Anime torrents. 500 from CI (reachable, server hiccup). From FMHY anime-torrenting.

sources.name: ShanaProject
sources.notes: Anime release tracker with RSS. Confirmed 200. RSS makes this engine-cheap. From FMHY anime-torrenting.

sources.name: iDope
sources.notes: DHT search engine. Durable meta-index. awesome-piracy + fmhy.

sources.name: BTDigg
sources.notes: DHT search with a JSON-ish API. Long-running. awesome-piracy.

sources.name: BT4G
sources.notes: Popular DHT aggregator; RSS available. fmhy. 403 from CI (Cloudflare).

sources.name: TorrentQuest
sources.notes: Aggregator. Confirmed 200. fmhy.

sources.name: Torr9
sources.notes: Video/Audio/Books aggregator. Confirmed 200. fmhy.

sources.name: UZTracker
sources.notes: Aggregator. fmhy.

sources.name: RARBG Dump
sources.notes: Static dump of the old RARBG catalog. Confirmed 200. fmhy. No new releases (historical).

sources.name: SubsPlease
sources.notes: Major current-season subgroup. Public JSON API + RSS → engine-cheap and high-value. r/Piracy anime GOAT.

sources.name: Erai-raws
sources.notes: Major multi-sub subgroup. RSS available. Sign-up may be needed. r/Piracy anime.

sources.name: Beatrice-Raws
sources.notes: High-quality raw (BD) anime torrents. r/Piracy anime.

sources.name: Drevos Index
sources.notes: Personal near-lossless BD encodes. r/Piracy anime.

sources.name: Project AcgnX
sources.notes: Chinese anime torrent aggregator (Anime Garden/Jiying/Youxia). r/Piracy anime.

sources.name: The Torrent Database (developify)
sources.notes: RESOLVED: r/Piracy all-purpose lists this as 'The Torrent Database' — a sizable well-seeded torrent DB. (Earlier 'purpose unclear' — now identified.)

sources.name: Rustorka
sources.notes: Russian warez forum/tracker (magnets). Russian UI. r/Piracy all-purpose.

sources.name: TorrentDownload
sources.notes: Distinct from torrentdownloads.pro (already a plugin). Latest TV/movies/music/games. r/Piracy all-purpose.

release_db.name: PreDB
release_db.api: unconfirmed (site exposes search; JSON endpoint not verified)
release_db.notes: Scene release / NFO database, NOT a torrent tracker. Useful for release-name → metadata, not for magnets. User-provided; categorize separately.

release_db.name: xREL
release_db.notes: German scene release board with a documented API. Release metadata, not magnets. r/Piracy all-purpose.

excluded.reason: Private trackers require invites/accounts; they are not public API endpoints and cannot become functional public plugins. Reference only.

CONFLICTING SIGNALS: the site showed a 'ceased operations 2026-05-09' notice when probed, but r/Piracy's anime megathread (moderator-approved, revised ~Jul 2026) still lists it as an active DDL mirror for Nyaa/TokyoTosho. Verify current status before wiring; do not add blind.
